news.title:
Systematix highlights SFBs valuations at trough levels, with Ujjivan and Equitas as top picks.
SFBs show 20% AUM growth; Jana SFB risks persist despite optimistic sector outlook.
news.summary:
Systematix highlights SFBs valuations at trough levels, with Ujjivan and Equitas as top picks.
SFBs show 20% AUM growth; Jana SFB risks persist despite optimistic sector outlook.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of Feb 24, 2026.
The analysis reflects the stock's position as of Apr 11, 2026, providing updated insights.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is rated Hold by MarketsMojo as of Feb 24, 2026.
The analysis reflects the stock's position as of Apr 11, 2026, providing updated insights.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank saw a 9.3% gain but shifted from fair to expensive valuation.
Its P/E and P/BV metrics indicate caution despite robust performance.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank saw a 9.3% gain but shifted from fair to expensive valuation.
Its P/E and P/BV metrics indicate caution despite robust performance.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's Q4 FY26 gross advances rose 21.6% YoY to ₹46,183 crore.
The growth reflects strong credit expansion and sustained business momentum.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's Q4 FY26 gross advances rose 21.6% YoY to ₹46,183 crore.
The growth reflects strong credit expansion and sustained business momentum.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's total deposits rose 7.96% y/y as of March 31, 2026.
Gross advances reached ₹461.83 billion by March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's total deposits rose 7.96% y/y as of March 31, 2026.
Gross advances reached ₹461.83 billion by March 31, 2026.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's board approved amendments to its insider trading and fair disclosure codes.
The updated codes are available on the bank's website for reference.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's board approved amendments to its insider trading and fair disclosure codes.
The updated codes are available on the bank's website for reference.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's valuation shifted from fair to expensive, reducing price attractiveness.
Mojo Grade downgraded from Buy to Hold; P/E and P/BV ratios need closer review.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's valuation shifted from fair to expensive, reducing price attractiveness.
Mojo Grade downgraded from Buy to Hold; P/E and P/BV ratios need closer review.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
RBI approves ICICI Prudential and ICICI Bank to acquire up to 9.95% stake in Equitas Small Finance Bank.
Approval valid for one year from Feb 10, 2026, subject to Banking Regulation Act, SEBI, and FEMA compliance.
news.summary:
RBI approves ICICI Prudential and ICICI Bank to acquire up to 9.95% stake in Equitas Small Finance Bank.
Approval valid for one year from Feb 10, 2026, subject to Banking Regulation Act, SEBI, and FEMA compliance.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank partners with Bharti AXA Life Insurance for bancassurance.
Bharti AXA will provide protection, savings, and retirement plans to Equitas customers.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank partners with Bharti AXA Life Insurance for bancassurance.
Bharti AXA will provide protection, savings, and retirement plans to Equitas customers.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank dropped 1.4%, closing at Rs.70.01 on Jan 30, 2026.
The stock underperformed Sensex, which rose 1.6%, amid strong earnings and asset quality.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank dropped 1.4%, closing at Rs.70.01 on Jan 30, 2026.
The stock underperformed Sensex, which rose 1.6%, amid strong earnings and asset quality.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's trading window closes Jan 1, 2026, for financial results.
Board meeting on Jan 29, 2026; trading resumes Feb 1, 2026, a special trading day.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's trading window closes Jan 1, 2026, for financial results.
Board meeting on Jan 29, 2026; trading resumes Feb 1, 2026, a special trading day.

news.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank's Q3 revenue rose to ₹17B from ₹16.1B YoY.
news.summary: Equitas Small Finance Bank's Q3 revenue rose to ₹17B from ₹16.1B YoY.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's Q3 GNPA fell to 2.75% from 2.92% QoQ.
NNPA also declined to 0.92% from 0.98% QoQ.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's Q3 GNPA fell to 2.75% from 2.92% QoQ.
NNPA also declined to 0.92% from 0.98% QoQ.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank issued 1,98,515 equity shares via employee stock options on Jan 6, 2026.
Paid-up share capital increased from Rs. 1140.7 Cr to Rs. 1140.9 Cr; new shares rank equally with existing ones.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank issued 1,98,515 equity shares via employee stock options on Jan 6, 2026.
Paid-up share capital increased from Rs. 1140.7 Cr to Rs. 1140.9 Cr; new shares rank equally with existing ones.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank posted a 15.9% YoY growth in advances, reaching Rs. 43,269 crore in Q3 FY26, with CASA deposits growing 10.6% YoY.
Asset quality showed improvement with MFI 1-90 DPD dropping to 2.77% and fresh OD principal outstanding reduced to Rs. 19.59 crore.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank posted a 15.9% YoY growth in advances, reaching Rs. 43,269 crore in Q3 FY26, with CASA deposits growing 10.6% YoY.
Asset quality showed improvement with MFI 1-90 DPD dropping to 2.77% and fresh OD principal outstanding reduced to Rs. 19.59 crore.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's Sr. Management member, John Alex, resigns effective April 1, 2026.
His tenure included major achievements like the National CSR Award and speaking at global forums like UNO.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank's Sr. Management member, John Alex, resigns effective April 1, 2026.
His tenure included major achievements like the National CSR Award and speaking at global forums like UNO.

news.title:
The Insurance Bill 2025 may cap insurance commissions, impacting banks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank, which earn significant profits from bancassurance.
Mid-sized banks like Equitas SFB and IndusInd Bank, with higher reliance on insurance income, could face pronounced earnings pressure due to the proposed changes.
news.summary:
The Insurance Bill 2025 may cap insurance commissions, impacting banks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank, which earn significant profits from bancassurance.
Mid-sized banks like Equitas SFB and IndusInd Bank, with higher reliance on insurance income, could face pronounced earnings pressure due to the proposed changes.

news.title:
India Ratings affirmed Equitas Small Finance Bank's issuer rating at 'IND AA/Stable'.
Tier II bonds rated 'IND AA/Stable' and certificates of deposit rated 'IND A1' were also affirmed.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirmed Equitas Small Finance Bank's issuer rating at 'IND AA/Stable'.
Tier II bonds rated 'IND AA/Stable' and certificates of deposit rated 'IND A1' were also affirmed.

news.title:
Equitas Small Finance Bank fell 2.4% to 60.8 on 5 Dec.
The decline follows weak financial results and low investor participation.
news.summary:
Equitas Small Finance Bank fell 2.4% to 60.8 on 5 Dec.
The decline follows weak financial results and low investor participation.
